title: Knysna schools miss out on Kay Motsepe Final Spots
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS  - Knysna Secondary School missed a golden opportunity to advance in the Kay Motsepe U19 Schools Cup after falling 2-0 to George Royal Academy in their opening elimination fixture at Kwanokuthula Stadium last weekend.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Secondary School missed a golden opportunity to advance in the Kay Motsepe U19 Schools Cup after falling 2-0 to George Royal Academy in their opening elimination fixture at Kwanokuthula Stadium last weekend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Lihle Toto opened the scoring for the Academy boys with a composed finish past Knysna goalkeeper Angelo Manuel, before Asiphe Nkata doubled the lead using his pace to break through the defence."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Defender Ayabonga Mtengwana delivered a standout performance, marshalling the Academy's back line throughout the match.","html":"Defender Ayabonga Mtengwana delivered a standout performance, marshalling the Academy's back line throughout the match."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Despite Knysna Secondary's attempts to fight back in the second half, they couldn't convert their chances.","html":"Despite Knysna Secondary's attempts to fight back in the second half, they couldn't convert their chances."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George Royal Academy held firm to book their place in the final with a solid all-round display.","html":"George Royal Academy held firm to book their place in the final with a solid all-round display."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"U13 Boys final","html":"U13 Boys final"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Primary School (Chris Nissan) also fell short, losing 2-0 to Mossel Bay's Isalathiso Primary. Oyisa Gxaba and George Mabandla scored the goals. Isalathiso, along with George Royal Academy and Thembalethu Primary","html":"Knysna Primary School (Chris Nissan) also fell short, losing 2-0 to Mossel Bay's Isalathiso Primary. Oyisa Gxaba and George Mabandla scored the goals. Isalathiso, along with George Royal Academy and Thembalethu Primary"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"(U13 girls), will represent Eden Region at the Western Cape Championships in Beaufort West later this year.","html":"(U13 girls), will represent Eden Region at the Western Cape Championships in Beaufort West later this year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
